summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. All P0 features verified: Coach Card UI uniform height, Pause/Restart Journey flow, Notifications, Session blocking when paused, Sessions Completed stat includes all journeys. 12/12 backend tests passed, all frontend flows working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All P0 features implemented correctly and working as expected
Coach Card UI uses h-full flex flex-col for uniform card heights (365px each)
Notifications created for coachee on pause/restart
Session creation correctly blocked when journey is paused (status != 'accepted')
Sessions Completed stat shows ALL sessions across all journeys (9 for Sarah)
GET /api/requests/active correctly includes 'paused' status in query
seed_data_creation: Sarah has 6 past completed sessions from previous journey with Gaurav (seeded). Current journey with Fatema has 3 completed sessions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 features tested and working: 1) Coach cards have uniform height (365px) using h-full flex flex-col. 2) Pause/Restart flow: Coach can pause active journey -> Paused badge appears -> Restart button replaces Pause -> Coach can restart -> Pause button returns. 3) Coachee sees 'Coaching Journey Paused' banner when paused, Schedule button disabled. 4) Sessions Completed stat shows 9 (6 past + 3 current) with 'All journeys' subtitle. 5) Session creation blocked when journey is paused (returns 400 'Invalid or non-accepted request').

pause_journey_api.test_pause_journey_success: PASS - Coach can pause, status changes to 'paused'

restart_journey_api.test_restart_journey_success: PASS - Coach can restart, status changes to 'accepted'

sessions_completed_stat.test_all_sessions_returned_not_just_curr: PASS - Sessions from multiple request_ids returned

coach_card_ui.h_full_class: PASS - All cards have h-full flex flex-col classes
coach_card_ui.footer_alignment: PASS - Footers aligned at bottom via flex-1 on about section

coach_dashboard.pause_button_visible: PASS - Pause button visible for active journey
coach_dashboard.pause_click_shows_badge: PASS - 'Paused' badge appears after clicking Pause
coach_dashboard.restart_button_replaces_pause: PASS - Restart button appears when paused
coach_dashboard.restart_click_restores_pause: PASS - Pause button returns after restart
coach_dashboard.toast_notifications: PASS - Toast shows 'Journey paused/resumed. Coachee has been notified.'

coachee_dashboard.paused_message: PASS - Message says 'Session scheduling is disabled until the journey is resumed'
coachee_dashboard.schedule_button_disabled: PASS - Schedule button is disabled when paused
coachee_dashboard.past_sessions_section: PASS - Shows 9 sessions from past journeys

features_verified.coach_card_uniform_height: VERIFIED - Cards use h-full flex flex-col, all 365px height
features_verified.pause_notifications: VERIFIED - Coachee receives notification on pause
features_verified.restart_notifications: VERIFIED - Coachee receives notification on restart
features_verified.coach_dashboard_pause_button: VERIFIED - Shows Pause for active, Restart for paused
features_verified.coach_dashboard_paused_badge: VERIFIED - Shows 'Paused' badge when journey is paused
features_verified.coachee_dashboard_paused_banner: VERIFIED - Shows paused banner with disabled scheduling message
features_verified.coachee_dashboard_schedule_disabled: VERIFIED - Schedule button disabled when paused
features_verified.sessions_completed_all_journeys: VERIFIED - Stat includes sessions from all journeys (9 for Sarah)
features_verified.session_blocking_when_paused: VERIFIED - Session creation returns 400 for paused journey
